result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Stare at a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new document, type a title, and then... nothing. The cursor blinks. The page stays empty. You make another coffee. That quiet moment between knowing what you want to write and actually writing it is one of the most common places our users tell us they get stuck — and today we're shipping something to help you move through it faster. Meet **Smart Drafts**, a new way to start any document with an AI-suggested outline built just for you.

Smart Drafts works with a single click. When you create a new document, you'll see a "Generate outline" button right at the top. Give your document a title — something as simple as "Q2 marketing review" or "Onboarding guide for new hires" — and Smart Drafts will propose a structured outline in seconds. It draws on your document title plus recent context from your workspace, so the suggestions feel grounded in the work you're already doing, not generic scaffolding. Keep what works, edit what doesn't, and start writing with momentum instead of friction. If you'd rather start from scratch, the button is easy to ignore — Smart Drafts only shows up when you want it.

This is the first step in a bigger direction for us. Next on the roadmap: **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts can learn the tone and structure of how *you* write and shape its suggestions to match. We're rolling that out to early testers in the coming weeks, and we'd love your feedback as we go. For now, Smart Drafts is live in every workspace — open a new document and give it a try. As always, thank you for building alongside us.
